subject: Upgrade to Pro plan?
body: Hi, we're currently on the Basic plan and would like to understand the upgrade path to Pro. Can you provide details and pricing? Regards, Jane from GreenLeaf

subject: Billing question for March invoice
body: Hello, I noticed a discrepancy on our March statement. Could someone take a look? Thanks, Alice

subject: Product Update Webinar Recording
body: Team, the recording from last week's product update webinar is now available on the intranet. Please review before the Q3 planning meeting.
